introSection: Arashi is a steel 4th dimension roller coaster currently operating at Nagashima Spa Land in Nagashima, Kuwana, Mie, Japan. It is an S&S Worldwide 4D Free Spin model and opened on 10 March 2017. Its track and structure were designed by Ride Centerline.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Arashi is a clone of five pre-existing 4D Free Spin coasters. However, it is the first of its kind in Asia. It has green track and black supports.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single car trains. Riders are arranged 4 across in 2 rows for a total of 8 riders per car.

fullText:
Arashi is a steel 4th dimension roller coaster currently operating at Nagashima Spa Land in Nagashima, Kuwana, Mie, Japan. It is an S&S Worldwide 4D Free Spin model and opened on 10 March 2017. Its track and structure were designed by Ride Centerline.

Arashi is a clone of five pre-existing 4D Free Spin coasters. However, it is the first of its kind in Asia. It has green track and black supports.

Single car trains. Riders are arranged 4 across in 2 rows for a total of 8 riders per car.

Arashi is Japanese for Storm.
